style_effects: Flickering translucent violet mist particles drift slowly around Venusaur's form, elongating shadows bending unnaturally at the edges. Its aura pulses with a pale, cold blue-white luminescence that distorts reflections in nearby still water, casting eerie ripples. The lighting mood is an unsettling, ghostly glow that makes the entire scene feel weightless and spectral. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
